terms.definition: An object that defines setup and cleanup actions run on entering and leaving a with block, ensuring cleanup even on errors.
The statement that activates a context manager for the duration of a block, binding __enter__'s result via an optional `as` clause.
The method called when a with block is entered; its return value is bound to the name after `as`.
The method called when a with block exits (normally or via exception); receiving the exception info and returning truthy to suppress it.
A decorator that turns a generator (with a single yield) into a context manager: code before yield is setup, code after (in finally) is cleanup.
